honesty_note: Ensemble run with per-prompt asyncio timeout of 90.0s to bound wall-clock; prompts that exceed the timeout are marked errored. The base ensemble's 25s per-vendor adapter timeout is unchanged; this is an outer wrapper to prevent the chain hanging when any single vendor's HTTP keepalive fails to fail-fast. per_vendor_agreement aggregates how often each vendor voted harmful / benign / unavailable across the run — input for AUDIT #17 dissent analysis.
